ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-11-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Continued hearing from June 24, 2014.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, Proceedings reported by: Miles Lendway, CSR#13684.

Ronald W. Chan, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, YU LIN CHEN.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) BOLDEN CAR SERVICES, LLC.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.

After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $76,760.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $13,206.93
Attorney's Fees: $4,475.00
Costs: $410.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $94,851.93
Judgment signed in open court.
